targetUser: Consultant, clinic operator or service owner preparing for a human-led meeting.
businessJob: Prepare an agenda and checklist before a human meeting so the reviewer can arrive with clear context.
valueHypothesis: A future Capsule could reduce meeting preparation friction by organizing public-safe notes and decision prompts for human review.
day1UserBenefit: A visitor sees how a Capsule could prepare a meeting checklist without calendar connector access, invites or automated booking.

publicSafeExamples: Conceptual preparation notes with no personal identifiers
forbiddenData: No email, phone, DNI, customerId or tenantId
No calendar payload, API key or provider key
No prompt text, raw evidence or private runtime path

runtimeBoundary: No private runtime is included; this manifest is not executable and does not schedule or authorize work.
connectorBoundary: No connector execution is included; calendar, email and booking systems remain outside C03.
dataBoundary: No secrets, no customer data, no telemetry, no PII, no prompt text, no raw evidence and no connector payloads are included.
complianceBoundary: No regulated advice, compliance certification, legal audit proof or ROI guarantee is provided.
ipBoundary: This public manifest preserves the source-available launcher posture and does not expose private runtime code.
cloudHandoffBoundary: Future Cloud handoff would require separate approved implementation and review before any hosted behavior exists.
localByokBoundary: Future local/BYOK setup would require separate configuration work; no API keys are requested here.
futureImplementationNotes: A future implementation would require private runtime review semantics outside this public manifest.
A future implementation would require approved calendar and data boundaries before any live action exists.
C03 ships manifest only, not executable template behavior.
